messages.content: hey
Has anyone tried the new React compiler?
I'm stuck on this binary tree problem.
Vim or Emacs? Let the war begin!
Did you see the game last night?
Anyone up for a pickup basketball game?
Looking for a gym buddy.
The cinematography in Dune was amazing.
What's your favorite Hitchcock film?
Just watched Everything Everywhere All At Once.
Best settings for night photography?
Canon vs Sony?
Check out this shot I took at the park.
The hiking trails are beautiful this time of year.
Saw a deer on my morning run.
Anyone know a good camping spot nearby?
Has anyone tried the new React compiler?
Yes! It's super fast, effectively removes the need for useMemo.
I'm still skeptical. Does it handle complex dependency arrays correctly?
From what I've seen, it's pretty solid. Just requires a build step.
Exactly. The optimization gains are worth the setup.
Did you see the game last night?
Yeah, that last-minute goal was insane!
I missed it! Who won?
Real Madrid, strictly on vibes as usual.
Typical. I need to catch the highlights.
The cinematography in Dune was amazing.
Agreed. Denis Villeneuve is a master of scale.
I felt the pacing was a bit slow in the middle though.
That's fair, but it builds the atmosphere perfectly.
The hiking trails are beautiful this time of year.
Saw a deer on my morning run.
Anyone know a good camping spot nearby?
Try the state park north of the campus, it's quiet on weekdays.
hey
folow
I once submitted the wrong assignment and still got an A. Guilt is real.
I pretend to understand the lecture and Google everything later.
I have eaten mess food and actually liked it once. Don't judge me.
I skipped an exam thinking it was optional... it wasn't.
Wrote the perfect answer... on the wrong question.
I studied the entire syllabus except the one topic that came for 30 marks.
My pen ran out of ink mid-exam. Used a borrowed pencil. Got 2 marks less for "readability".
Clutched a 1v4 with Jett last night, hands were literally shaking.
Nice! I'm stuck in Gold forever though.
Anyone up for a 5-stack tonight? Need a Sentinel main.
I just started playing, any tips for beginners?
Crosshair placement is everything. Keep it at head level always.
Anyone else obsessed with the Queen's Gambit opening?
I prefer the Sicilian Defense. Aggressive from move one.
Let's organize a campus chess tournament this month!
Who has notes for Operating Systems? My notes are a disaster.
I have good ones. Will share the drive link tonight.
Can we do a group study session in the library tomorrow?
Count me in. 5 PM works?
Solved my first hard problem on LeetCode today!
Which one? I'm stuck on dynamic programming problems.
It was "Longest Increasing Subsequence". DP is all about finding the subproblem.
I recommend Striver's sheet — it builds concepts step by step.
Can someone explain Dijkstra's algorithm simply?
Think of it like finding the shortest route on Google Maps — it always picks the cheapest next step.
That analogy is actually perfect! Greedy approach at each node.
Our line follower bot finally works! Took 3 weeks of debugging.
Nice! We're building a drone for the inter-college competition.
Anyone know a good source for cheap servo motors?
This week's topic: "Should college attendance be mandatory?" — I say absolutely not.
Counter: without mandatory attendance, most students won't show up at all.
Make the classes engaging and students will come voluntarily.
Facts. Nobody skips a good teacher's class.
When the prof says "this won't come in the exam" and it's 50% of the paper 💀
My WiFi during online exams: "Connection lost at crucial moment" every single time.
College brochure: Modern labs with latest equipment. Reality: Windows XP and hope.
LMAO too real. The lab PCs take 10 minutes to boot.
Prof: "Any questions?" *moves to next slide in 0.3 seconds*
"I'll let you go 5 minutes early" — the biggest lie in academia.
When the prof uses their own book as the textbook and tests from stuff not in it.
Inter-department cricket starts next week. CSE vs Mech — who's winning?
CSE boys are all-rounders... in coding, not cricket 😂
Don't underestimate us! We have a secret weapon this year.
Sunday evening match on the main ground. 6v6, bring your own water.
I'll be there! Need more people for defense though.
I can play keeper. Just don't blame me if we concede 10.
Campus gym finally got new dumbbells! No more fighting over the 10kg ones.
Anyone want to start a morning workout group? 6 AM daily.
6 AM? That's when I'm in my deepest REM sleep. How about 7?
I'm in for 7. Need to get in shape before fest season.
Just discovered this indie artist called Prateek Kuhad — absolute vibe.
Cold/Mess is a masterpiece. Also check out The Local Train.
Anyone here into lo-fi? Need study playlist recommendations.
I'll share my 500+ track lo-fi playlist. It got me through finals.
Looking for a drummer for our band. We play alternative rock.
I play drums! When's the audition?
This Saturday, music room, 4 PM. Bring sticks!
Had a rough week. Assignments piling up and feeling overwhelmed.
Been there. Take it one task at a time. You're doing better than you think.
The counseling center on campus is actually really helpful. No shame in going.
Remember: your worth isn't defined by your GPA. Take breaks when needed.
Night walk around campus with earphones in — instant therapy.
I journal before bed. Gets all the anxious thoughts out of my head.
Gaming for an hour after studying helps me reset completely.
Cooking maggi at 2 AM in the hostel kitchen is my stress buster 🍜
Selling "Introduction to Algorithms" (CLRS) — barely used, ₹400.
I need "Digital Electronics" by Morris Mano. Anyone selling?
I have it! DM me. Also have Signals & Systems if anyone needs.
Selling my old Logitech mouse — works perfectly, ₹500 only.
Anyone selling a second-hand mechanical keyboard?
I have a Redgear one, Cherry MX Blue switches. ₹1500, 6 months old.
TechFest registrations open next Monday! Hackathon has ₹50K prize pool.
I'm forming a team of 4 for the hackathon. Need a UI/UX person.
Cultural night lineup looks amazing this year — Nucleya is performing!
Already got my front-row wristband. This is going to be epic.
Free AWS Cloud workshop this Friday — certificates included.
Google Developer Student Club is hosting a Flutter bootcamp next week.
Is the cybersecurity workshop by InfoSec club still happening?
Yes! Saturday 3 PM in Lab 5. Bring your laptop.
TCS NQT pattern changed this year. More focus on coding now.
For Infosys, practice pseudo code questions. They're tricky but doable.
Anyone cleared Amazon OA? What topics should I focus on?
Graphs, DP, and sliding window — those three cover 80% of Amazon questions.
Microsoft internship applications close this Friday — apply ASAP!
I got a referral for Google STEP. Happy to share tips.
Any good internships for non-CS branches? Mech here.
Check out Tata Motors and Bosch — they have solid mech internship programs.
